user.title: Add Price Zone
user.description: Select a Swedish electricity price zone (prisområde) to monitor.

data_description.price_zone:
SE1 = Luleå / Northern Sweden
SE2 = Sundsvall / North-Central Sweden
SE3 = Stockholm / South-Central Sweden
SE4 = Malmö / Southern Sweden
data_description.name: Optional display name — defaults to zone name, e.g. Stockholm / SE3.

surcharges.title: Contract Surcharges (optional)
surcharges.description: Enter the fixed surcharges from your electricity contract in **öre/kWh**. Find these in your supplier's price specification (prisspecifikation). When filled in, extra sensors showing your real total consumer price will be created. Leave at 0 to skip.

data_description.surcharge_spot_markup: E.g. 7.00 — fixed markup added per kWh on top of spot
data_description.surcharge_variable_costs: E.g. 6.99 — variable handling/grid costs billed per kWh
data_description.surcharge_other: Any other per-kWh surcharge from your contract

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to elprisetjustnu.se — check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This price zone is already configured.
